name: rayread
title: RayRead
description: Proofread selected text with AI and paste the corrected version back into the active app.
author: net-snix

commands.name: proofread
commands.title: Proofread Selection
commands.description: Proofread selected text and paste the corrected result

preferences.name: provider
preferences.title: AI Provider
preferences.description: Choose which AI provider proofreads the selected text.

preferences.name: outputMode
preferences.title: Output Mode
preferences.description: Paste over the selected text or only copy the result.

preferences.name: openaiApiKey
preferences.title: OpenAI-Compatible API Key
preferences.description: Required only when using OpenAI Compatible.

preferences.name: openaiModel
preferences.title: OpenAI-Compatible Model
preferences.description: Model name for the OpenAI-compatible chat completions endpoint.
